label: Cloud First Policy
hint: Government organisations must use public cloud services, when possible, for information systems. This is the NZ government’s Cloud First policy.

label: All of Government Cloud Sourcing Strategy
hint: This strategy describes how the Government Chief Digital Officer (GCDO) will support government agencies to procure a diverse range of secure and resilient cloud services.

label: API guidelines — Part A: API concepts and management 2022
hint: API guidelines — Part A contains the business context for APIs within government. It describes the principles and considerations that creating APIs could impact an agency, across government and public services, and commercial innovation.

label: API guidelines — Part B: API security 2022
hint: API guidelines — Part B contains the API security reference architecture and technical details for implementing API security.

label: API guidelines — Part C: API development 2022
hint: API guidelines — Part C contains the technical details for API development, including general API implementation standards for API developers and consuming application developers.

label: New Zealand API Standard
hint: This standard establishes requirements and recommendations for New Zealand government agencies developing, deploying, and operating Application Programming Interfaces (APIs).

label: NZ Data and Information Management Principles
hint: Government data management principles including open data, accessibility, and protection requirements

label: Privacy Act 2020
hint: The purpose of this Act is to promote and protect individual privacy by providing a framework for protecting an individual’s right to privacy of personal information, including the right of an individual to access their personal information, while recognising that other rights and interests may at times also need to be taken into account; and giving effect to internationally recognised privacy obligations and standards in relation to the privacy of personal information, including the OECD Guidelines and the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights.

label: Digital Service Design Standard
hint: Design standard for NZ government digital service delivery

label: Web Accessibility Standard 1.2
hint: All public service departments and non-public service departments in the Executive branch must meet the NZ Government Web Accessibility Standard 1.2 from 17 March 2025.

label: Web Usability Standard 1.4
hint: All public service departments and non-public service departments in the Executive branch must meet the NZ Government Web Usability Standard 1.4 from 17 March 2025.

label: Protective Security Requirements — Information Security
hint: Government-wide information security policy framework and requirements from the Protective Security Requirements (PSR)

label: Information Sharing Standard
hint: Requirements for public service agencies handling personal information shared with third parties

label: Identification Standard - Information Assurance Standard
hint: This standard provides specific information management controls to ensure information collected is suitable for accurate decisions to be made regarding the eligibility or capability of an Entity.

label: Identification Standard - Binding Assurance Standard
hint: This standard provides specific controls for ensuring an entity is appropriately bound to their entity information in order to prevent identity theft.

label: Identification Standard - Authentication Assurance Standard
hint: This standard provides the controls used to ensure that 1 or more Authenticators are still possessed and solely controlled by the authorised holder.

label: Identification Standard - Federation Assurance Standard
hint: This standard provides additional controls for parties that provide credentials and/or presentation facilitation mechanisms on which others rely.

label: Microsoft Compliance - New Zealand Government Information Security and Privacy Considerations
hint: This page outlines the New Zealand government's framework for adopting public cloud services, emphasizing compliance with security and privacy considerations. It details the actions required by government organizations before utilizing cloud services, including risk assessments and adherence to the New Zealand Privacy Act 2020.

label: Risks assessment for public cloud services
hint: How to assess the risks of using public cloud services in your government agency and how to use your risk assessment.

label: War Pensions Act 1954
hint: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to war pensions and allowances.

label: Data and Statistics Act 2022
hint: This Act is the Data and Statistics Act 2022.

label: State Sector Act 1988
hint: This Act may be cited as the State Sector Act 1988

label: Social Welfare (Reciprocity Agreements, and New Zealand Artificial Limb Service) Act 1990
hint: This Act is the Social Welfare (Reciprocity Agreements, and New Zealand Artificial Limb Service) Act 1990.

label: Social Security Act 2018
hint: This Act is the Social Security Act 2018.

label: Residential Care and Disability Support Services Act 2018
hint: This Act is the Residential Care and Disability Support Services Act 2018.

label: Public Records Act 2005
hint: This Act is the Public Records Act 2005.

label: Ombudsmen Act 1975
hint: This Act is the Ombudsmen Act 1975.

label: Official Information Act 1982
hint: An Act to make official information more freely available, to provide for proper access by each person to official information relating to that person, to protect official information to the extent consistent with the public interest and the preservation of personal privacy, to establish procedures for the achievement of those purposes, and to repeal the Official Secrets Act 1951.

label: New Zealand Superannuation and Retirement Income Act 2001
hint: This Act is the New Zealand Superannuation and Retirement Income Act 2001.

label: Human Rights Act 1993
hint: An Act to consolidate and amend the Race Relations Act 1971 and the Human Rights Commission Act 1977 and to provide better protection of human rights in New Zealand in general accordance with United Nations Covenants or Conventions on Human Rights.

label: Holidays Act 2003
hint: This Act is the Holidays Act 2003.

label: Health and Safety at Work Act 2015
hint: This Act is the Health and Safety at Work Act 2015.

label: Employment Relations Act 2000
hint: This Act is the Employment Relations Act 2000.

label: Oranga Tamariki Act 1989 - Children’s and Young People’s Well-being Act 1989
hint: This Act is the Oranga Tamariki Act 1989.

label: Bill of Rights 1688
hint: An Act declaring the rights and liberties of the subject, and settling the succession of the Crown.

label: Copyright Act 1994
hint: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to copyright.

label: Student Allowances Regulations 1998
hint: This Act is the Student Allowances Regulations Act 1998
